gym.name: QUWWA
gym.tagline: Built for those who refuse to stop.

branches.name: Dubai Marina
branches.address: Marina Walk, Dubai Marina, Dubai, UAE

branches.name: JLT
branches.address: Cluster O, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, UAE

history.event: QUWWA founded in Dubai Marina with just 200 members and a dream.
Opened second branch in JLT to meet growing demand across Dubai.
Launched online class booking platform and certified 10 in-house trainers.
Surpassed 5,000 active members. Renovated Marina branch with new equipment.
Introduced recovery & wellness program, including yoga and physiotherapy.
Named #1 gym in Dubai Marina by FitLife Arabia magazine.

classes.name: HIIT Blast
classes.description: High-intensity interval training to torch calories and boost endurance.

classes.name: Power Lift
classes.description: Olympic lifting and compound movements for serious strength gains.

classes.name: Morning Flow Yoga
classes.description: A gentle morning yoga flow to improve flexibility and mental clarity.

classes.name: Boxing Fundamentals
classes.description: Learn stance, footwork, and basic combinations in a fun group setting.

classes.name: Core Crusher
classes.description: 30 minutes of targeted core work — abs, obliques, and lower back.

classes.name: Spin Cycle
classes.description: High-energy indoor cycling to upbeat music. Great for all fitness levels.

classes.name: Restorative Yoga
classes.description: Deep stretching and mindfulness for full-body recovery.

classes.name: Advanced Boxing
classes.description: Combinations, sparring drills, and defensive techniques for experienced boxers.

trainers.name: Sara Ahmed
trainers.bio: Sara is a certified HIIT and functional training coach with 8 years of experience. She has trained over 500 clients across Dubai and Abu Dhabi, helping everyone from complete beginners to competitive athletes reach their peak. Sara's sessions are high-energy, results-driven, and always fun.

clientQuote.text: Sara pushed me beyond what I thought I was capable of. I lost 18kg in 5 months and I've never felt stronger.
clientQuote.author: Ahmed R., Pro Member

trainers.name: Mike Torres
trainers.bio: Former competitive powerlifter and strength coach with a decade of experience. Mike specialises in Olympic lifting and progressive overload programming. He has coached national-level athletes and everyday gym-goers with equal dedication and passion.

clientQuote.text: Mike's programming took my deadlift from 80kg to 160kg in under a year. His technical knowledge is unmatched.
clientQuote.author: James W., Elite Member

trainers.name: Layla Hassan
trainers.bio: 200-hour RYT yoga instructor with a background in physiotherapy. Layla blends movement science with mindfulness to deliver sessions that heal the body and calm the mind. She works with clients recovering from injuries and those seeking a deeper mind-body connection.

clientQuote.text: Layla's classes completely changed my relationship with my body. My back pain is gone and I feel more at peace than ever.
clientQuote.author: Fatima K., Starter Member

trainers.name: Omar Khalid
trainers.bio: Ex-amateur boxing champion turned coach. Omar brings competitive-level technique to beginner and advanced students alike. His classes combine real boxing fundamentals with intense cardio conditioning, producing athletes who are fast, focused, and fearless.

clientQuote.text: Omar's classes are the highlight of my week. I started as a total beginner and now I can hold my own in sparring drills!
clientQuote.author: Nour S., Pro Member

trainers.name: Rania Mostafa
trainers.bio: Rania is a mindfulness and mobility specialist who combines breathwork, flexibility training, and mental wellness into every session. With 6 years of teaching experience, she creates a safe, inclusive space for all body types and fitness levels.

clientQuote.text: Rania helped me manage my anxiety through movement. Her sessions are truly transformative — I leave feeling like a new person.
clientQuote.author: Priya M., Pro Member

trainers.name: James Okafor
trainers.tagline: Train like an athlete. Live like a champion.
trainers.bio: James is a former professional rugby player turned strength and conditioning coach. With 9 years of experience, he builds athletic performance programs for all levels — from beginners building their first foundation to seasoned athletes chasing peak performance.

clientQuote.text: James brought a whole new level of athleticism to my training. His rugby background shows — the conditioning work is brutal but brilliant.
clientQuote.author: Khalid M., Elite Member

trainers.name: Nour Al Rashid
trainers.tagline: Every rep. Every km. Every win.
trainers.bio: Nour is a certified spin and functional cardio coach who specialises in high-energy group sessions. She holds records in the UAE national marathon circuit and channels that competitive drive into every class she leads.

clientQuote.text: Nour's spin classes are absolutely electric. I've tried gyms all over Dubai and nothing compares to her energy.
clientQuote.author: Sara L., Pro Member

trainers.name: David Kim
trainers.tagline: Technique wins fights. Focus wins life.
trainers.bio: David trained under WBC-certified coaches in South Korea before relocating to Dubai. He focuses on technique, speed, and mental resilience — building fighters who are sharp in the ring and sharp in life.

clientQuote.text: David's technical coaching is on another level. In 3 months he transformed my footwork and combination speed completely.
clientQuote.author: Omar F., Elite Member

trainers.name: Hana Siddiqui
trainers.bio: Hana is a Zumba and dance fitness instructor with a background in professional dance. Her sessions are energetic, fun, and incredibly effective — burning up to 700 calories per class while keeping you smiling the whole way through.

clientQuote.text: I used to dread working out. Hana's classes made me actually look forward to the gym. I've lost 10kg and gained so much confidence.
clientQuote.author: Lina B., Starter Member

trainers.name: Tariq Al Mansoori
trainers.tagline: Built in Dubai. Forged in iron.
trainers.bio: Tariq is QUWWA's head strength coach and a 3x UAE powerlifting champion. With 12 years of experience, he designs bespoke strength programs for competitive and recreational athletes. His deep knowledge of biomechanics and sports nutrition sets him apart.

clientQuote.text: Tariq is the best coach I've ever worked with. His attention to form and programming detail is exceptional. A true champion.
clientQuote.author: Hamad A., Elite Member

testimonials.name: Ahmed R.
testimonials.text: QUWWA changed my life. Lost 18kg in 6 months with their Pro plan and Sara's coaching. Best investment I've made.

testimonials.name: Fatima K.
testimonials.text: The yoga classes with Layla are incredible. The atmosphere is calming and she always adjusts for everyone's level.

testimonials.name: James W.
testimonials.text: Great facilities, modern equipment and very clean. Mike's Power Lift class is no joke — I'm stronger than ever.

testimonials.name: Nour S.
testimonials.text: Omar's boxing classes are so fun. I started as a total beginner and now I can hold my own in sparring drills!

testimonials.name: Priya M.
testimonials.text: The community here is amazing. Everyone is so supportive and the staff goes out of their way to help you reach your goals.

faqs.question: Can I try before committing?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer a free 1-day trial pass. Visit any branch with a valid ID and ask at reception.

faqs.question: Can I freeze my membership?
faqs.answer: Members can freeze their membership for up to 2 months per year. Contact reception or email us to arrange.

faqs.question: Are there contracts?
faqs.answer: Our plans are month-to-month with no long-term contract. Cancel anytime with 7 days' notice.

faqs.question: Do you offer student discounts?
faqs.answer: Yes — 15% off all plans for students with a valid university ID.

faqs.question: Is parking available?
faqs.answer: Both branches have dedicated free parking for members during their session.

faqs.question: What should I bring on my first day?
faqs.answer: Just yourself, comfortable workout clothes, and a water bottle. We provide towels for Pro and Elite members.
